alerts.message: 🟢 Scan v0.3.0 — 65 outbound / 38 return award options (US hubs ↔ GRU/GIG, Dec 17–Jan 4). Best premium-econ RT (3 pax, ≥3 seats, layover-OK): MCO-BOG-GRU 2026-12-20 + GRU-ORD 2026-12-24 = 360,000 mi (UR/MR → Virgin Atlantic / UR → United). Business saver for 3 still scarce (Christmas peak) — hunting daily.
